en.today: The Virgo Lunar Eclipse highlights flaws, intensifies emotions, and magnifies the consequences of unhealthy lifestyles. Broken systems collapse and force you to pivot, dearest Aries, especially within your work environment and daily routines. Acknowledge which aspects of your existence create the most strain. Search for solutions that bring more convenience to your life without compromising physical, emotional, or mental needs. Jupiter offers a morale boost by amplifying your intuition, making it easier to honor your feelings and proceed accordingly. Keep a close eye on your thoughts and actions when the Moon opposes Mercury Rx this evening, which may cause you to backslide.

en.today: You'll feel present, emotionally charged, and eager to settle uncertain circumstances, dear Leo. As the Virgo Lunar Eclipse rises, you won't be in the mood to downplay desires. You'll see a world of possibility as the Pisces Sun, Mercury rx, Venus, and Mars conjure themes around transformation and investment. Now is the time to consider your options, cutting loose people or situations that continuously string you along. You may be the beneficiary of someone else's generosity while Jupiter is activated. Appreciate blessings as they come, but look for opportunities to pass them on. Assess your finances when Luna opposes Mercury Rx this evening, and make a plan to pay off debts.
